entity.summary: Aptos decentralized trading and liquidity platform combining swap aggregation, concentrated-liquidity market making, order-book execution support, vault strategies, liquidity mining, and advanced trading orders.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Hyperion as the unified liquidity and trading layer of Aptos, combining swap aggregation, CLMM market making, vault strategies, and swap execution across AMM and order-book models. Duplicate registry source rows are consolidated into one entity.

evidence.title: Hyperion Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Hyperion as an Aptos trading and liquidity platform combining swap aggregation, concentrated-liquidity market making, and vault strategies.

evidence.title: Hyperion Swap documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap documentation explains live DEX swap functionality and support for both AMM liquidity-pool and first-in-first-out order-book execution models.

evidence.title: Hyperion documentation hub
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation hub exposes swap, concentrated liquidity, liquidity mining, range orders, recurring orders, pool creation, SDK, contract, API, security, and audit documentation.
